description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on workflow dispatch, pull requests, and pushes, while ignoring certain paths and branches. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (macOS 13, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Ubuntu 22.04 ARM, Windows 2022) and Node.js versions (18, 20, 22, 23). It checks out the code, sets up the environment, and then runs tests specific to Windows or macOS/Linux, and finally generates a test report.
